checkpoint: Generated a replacement after rejecting the first attempt for weak ear-tip and foreleg-stripe fidelity; visually QA-checked the selected coherent eight-pose strip.

verification.poses: Separated complete seated poses progress closed mouth -> inhale -> opening -> full yowl -> sustained yowl -> closing -> recovered.
verification.background: Visually uniform flat magenta chroma field (the source needs the parent pipeline's exact-key normalization rather than a broad flood-fill, which damaged sprite pixels in an experimental copy).
verification.identity: Lean black tuxedo, black face/chin and neck sides, white front throat/chest, white toes, consistent long left-foreleg stripe, and modest flat left TNR ear tip are present.
verification.layout: Full-body sprites have consistent scale/baseline with no cropping or overlap.
